typeNotes.mini: Silent, tiny, no discrete GPU. Drives 2-4 monitors on integrated graphics. Perfect for document review, drafting, and light modeling.
typeNotes.office: Standard office tower. Some accept a low-power GPU (RTX 4060 class, 115W). Good for drafting and modeling. Cannot fit a high-end GPU.
typeNotes.workstation: ISV-certified, vPro, ECC optional. Real support. RTX Pro (not GeForce) GPUs -- fine for modeling, underpowered for serious viz.
typeNotes.gaming: When you need a real GPU, buy a gaming desktop. 850W PSU, triple-slot GPU clearance, proper cooling. Outperforms an ISV-certified workstation for Enscape/Lumion/V-Ray, often by a wide margin.

items.name: ASUS ExpertCenter PB64
items.note: Core Ultra 5/7, up to 64 GB DDR5, quad 4K display. VESA mounts behind a monitor. Silent.

items.name: ASUS ExpertCenter PN55
items.note: AMD Ryzen AI 400, Radeon 800M, quad 4K. Shipping Q2 2026.

items.name: Intel NUC 14 Pro
items.note: Core Ultra, compact, Thunderbolt 4. Good dock ecosystem.

items.name: Lenovo ThinkCentre Tiny (M90q)
items.note: Core Ultra 7, vPro, 64 GB max. IT-managed fleets.

items.name: Mac Mini M4 Pro
items.note: 24-48 GB unified. The Mac mini PC.

items.name: Lenovo ThinkCentre Neo 50t
items.note: i5/i7, 32 GB, has PCIe x16 slot. Add an RTX 4060 for viewport acceleration.

items.name: Dell Inspiron Tower (Plus)
items.note: Core Ultra, up to RTX 4060 from factory. Solid value.

items.name: HP ProDesk Tower 400/600
items.note: Core i7, optional RTX A400. A commodity box -- reliable, boring, cheap.

items.name: Dell Pro Max Tower T2
items.note: Core Ultra 5/7/9, unlimited turbo duration, ISV certified. RTX Pro GPUs only -- no GeForce.

items.name: HP Z2 Tower G9 / G10
items.note: Core i7/i9 or Core Ultra, ISV certified. Quiet. RTX A-series GPUs.

items.name: Lenovo ThinkStation P3 Tower
items.note: Core i7/i9 or Core Ultra 7, 128 GB max, RTX Ada GPUs. ThinkStation reliability.

items.name: ASUS ROG G16CH
items.note: RTX 5070 Ti, 850W PSU, good airflow. Looks like a gaming PC because it is one.

items.name: MSI MAG Infinite S3
items.note: RTX 5070/5070 Ti, clean design, 750W PSU. Less gamer aesthetic than most.

items.name: CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme
items.note: Configurable. Order with an RTX 5070 Ti and 64 GB. Cheapest path to a real GPU.

items.name: iBuyPower / NZXT BLD
items.note: Custom config. Pick your CPU, GPU, RAM. Cleaner builds than CyberPowerPC.
